name: iFlight ELRS Nano 2.4GHz Receiver + 160mm Antenna
description: With the extreme range and high packet rate of the iFlight ELRS Nano 2.4GHz Receiver and 160mm Antenna, failsafes are a thing of the past.

name: FrSky X8R 16ch Receiver, SBUS, Smart Port - Amplified PCB Antenna
description: The new FrSky X8R 16ch Receiver with SBUS, Smart Port - Telemetry - Amplified PCB Antenna

name: iFlight ELRS 500mW 900MHz Receiver + 220mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS 500mW 900MHz Receiver houses high-power telemetry inside a sleek, single-side component design.

name: iFlight ELRS 500mW 900M Receiver + 160mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS 500mW 900MHz Receiver houses high-power telemetry inside a sleek, single-side component design.

name: HappyModel ES900 900MHz ELRS Dual RX Diversity Receiver
description: The HappyModel ES900 900MHz ELRS Dual RX Diversity Receiver has 915MHz / 868MHz and built-in TCXO. Ideal for RC Airplanes and FPV Long Range Drones.

name: ImmersionRC Tramp/Ghost Hybrid DUO V2 2.4GHz Rx & 25-600mW 5.8GHz VTX
description: The new ImmersionRC Tramp/Ghost Hybrid DUO V2 is a high-end analog 5.8GHz 25mW - 600mW video transmitter and 2.4GHz diversity receiver!

name: iFlight ELRS Dualband 500mW Receiver + 220mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS Dualband 500mW Receiver + 220mm Antenna houses high-power telemetry inside a sleek, single-side component design.

name: iFlight ELRS Dualband Diversity 100mW Receiver - 2x70mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS Dualband Diversity 100mW Receiver - 2x70mm Antenna supports 2.4GHz, 868MHz, and 900MHz frequencies for exceptional stability and reliability.

name: iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x160mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x160mm Antenna is a true dual-antenna diversity receiver with exceptional frequency stability.

name: iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x220mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x220mm Antenna is a true dual-antenna diversity receiver with exceptional frequency stability.

name: iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x70mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x70mm Antenna is a true dual-antenna diversity receiver with exceptional frequency stability.

name: iFlight ELRS Dualband 100mW Receiver - 160mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS Dualband 100mW Receiver - 160mm Antenna supports 2.4GHz, 868MHz, and 900MHz frequencies for exceptional stability and reliability.

name: iFlight ELRS Nano 2.4GHz Receiver + 70mm Antenna
description: It's finally here, the iFlight ELRS Nano 2.4GHz Receiver + 70mm Antenna with extreme range and packet rate for lowest delay.

name: BETAFPV SuperX Gemini Xross Receiver w/ T-Antenna - Mono ELRS 2.4GHz/915Mhz
description: The BETAFPV SuperX Gemini Xross Receiver w/ T-Antenna - Mono ELRS 2.4GHz/915Mhz is powered by Semtech’s LR1121 RF and Espressif’s ESP32-C3 chips.

name: TBS Crossfire Diversity Nano RX
description: A full-capability TBS Crossfire Diversity receiver in nano form factor. Ideal for long range miniquads or smaller wings.

name: BETAFPV SuperX Gemini Xross Receiver w/ T-Antennas - Nano ELRS 2.4GHz/915Mhz
description: The BETAFPV SuperX Nano ELRS Dual-Band Diversity Receiver is a true diversity solution designed for maximum reliability in long-range FPV, freestyle, and aerial applications. Equipped with dual receiver chains, TCXO technology for extreme temperature stability, and dual antennas for stronger signal coverage, it ensures consistent performance in demanding environments.

name: RadioMaster XR1 Nano Multi-Frequency Receiver - ELRS 2.4GHz
description: The XR1 Receiver is a compact ExpressLRS receiver, measuring 20 x 13mm. Powered by the third-generation Semtech LR1121 transceiver, it operates on 2.4GHz, offering excellent range and sensitivity in a lightweight design.

name: RadioMaster ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver w/Antennas - RP4TD
description: The ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - RP4TD, with dual-channel 2.4GHz radios, leads in signal sensitivity and performance with its optimized circuit design.

name: RadioMaster XR3 Nano Multi-Frequency Diversity Receiver - ELRS 2.4GHz
description: The XR3 Receiver is a compact ExpressLRS receiver, measuring 20 x 15mm and powered by the third-generation Semtech LR1121 transceiver. It operates on 2.4GHz, offering exceptional range and sensitivity in a lightweight design, which is ideal for any build.

name: GEPRC Dual Antenna Diversity Receiver - ELRS 915MHz
description: The GEPRC ELRS DUAL 915M Diversity Receiver is a next-gen, dual-antenna receiver based on the ExpressLRS open-source project, delivering long-range operation, low latency, and up to 200 Hz refresh rate.

name: HGLRC Gemini ELRS 2.4GHz RX Dual Receiver
description: Introducing the HGLRC ELRS 2.4GHz GEMINI Receiver, a cutting-edge receiver with dual communication links and true diversity dual reception for exceptional anti-interference performance.

name: HGLRC Gemini ELRS 915MHz RX Dual Receiver
description: Introducing the HGLRC Gemini RX Dual Receiver, a cutting-edge receiver with dual communication links and true diversity dual reception for exceptional anti-interference performance.

name: Foxeer ELRS Diversity Receiver - 915MHz
description: Introducing the advanced Foxeer 915MHz RX Module, designed to deliver exceptional performance and reliability for your FPV drone needs.

name: DarwinFPV Cement Ultra Durable ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver
description: Introducing the DarwinFPV Cement Ultra Durable ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver, engineered to withstand extreme environments.

name: BETAFPV ELRS Lite V1.1 2.4GHz Receiver w/ Flat Antenna
description: The BETAFPV Lite 2.4GHz receiver is based on the ExpressLRS project, an open-source RC link for RC applications.

name: BETAFPV SuperD ELRS 2.4GHz Diversity Receiver
description: The BETAFPV SuperD ELRS Receiver is the first True Diversity Receiver that applies two antennas, dual receiver chains, and TCXO (temperature-compensated crystal oscillator) technology, achieving a super accurate frequency rate and excellent performance in extreme temperature environments.

name: MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz True Diversity Receiver - ELRS R24-TD
description: Introducing the MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz True Diversity Receiver - ELRS R24-TD, your reliable companion for long-range RC control.

name: BETAFPV SuperD ELRS 915MHz Diversity Receiver
description: The BETAFPV SuperD ELRS Receiver is the first True Diversity Receiver that applies two antennas, dual receiver chains, and TCXO (temperature-compensated crystal oscillator) technology, achieving a super accurate frequency rate and excellent performance in extreme temperature environments.

name: FrSky TD SR18 2.4GHz 900M Dual-Band Tandem Receiver w/ Antennas
description: The FrSky TD SR18 combines an upgraded ADV Stabilizer function with traditional gyroscope stabilization modes. It features 5 additional channels and advanced pin mapping for diverse flight modes, such as Stabilization, Auto-Level, Hover, and Knife-Edge.

name: TBS Crossfire Nano Rx Pro - NDAA
description: The TBS Crossfire Nano RX Pro is a higher telemetry output power option of the de-facto FPV standard receiver. This version is NDAA-compliant and made in the USA.

name: HGLRC ELRS 2.4GHz RX-T Receiver w/ T-Antennas
description: The HGLRC ELRS 2.4GHz RX-T Receiver stands out with its compact design and versatile connectivity options, making it a convenient choice for RC enthusiasts.

name: TBS Crossfire Nano SE LR Receiver w/ Immortal-T V2 Antenna - NDAA
description: TBS takes long-range and UHF technology to the next level with the new and improved NDAA Version of the TBS Crossfire Nano SE LR Receiver.

name: TBS Crossfire Nano Rx
description: TBS Crossfire Nano RX is for people who want to save space and solder. Full range, designed specifically for mini- and micro-quads!

name: RadioMaster Ranger 2.4Ghz ELRS Module - Starter Combo
description: The RadioMaster Ranger 2.4GHz ELRS Module Starter Combo features a rugged CNC case and two module bay adapters.  This starter combo also includes additional RPI receivers and one RP2 Receiver.

name: RadioMaster Ranger Micro 2.4Ghz ELRS Module - Starter Combo
description: The RadioMaster Ranger Micro 2.4GHz ELRS Module Starter Combo features a JR module bay adapter, packet rates up to F-1000Hz, up to 1 Watt Power output, and a high-efficiency cooling system. This starter combo also includes additional RPI receivers and one RP2 Receiver.

name: RadioMaster Ranger Nano 2.4Ghz ELRS Module - Starter Combo
description: The RadioMaster Ranger Nano 2.4GHz ELRS Module Starter Combo features a nano module bay adapter and additional RPI receivers and one RP2 Receiver.

name: RadioMaster ER5C-i ExpressLRS 2.4GHz PWM Receiver w/ Built-in Antenna
description: The RadioMaster ER5C-i receiver harnesses the advanced ExpressLRS system, offering exceptional reliability, customizable settings, rapid response, and extended reception range for an unparalleled user experience.

name: FrSky TD R18 2.4GHz 900M Dual-Band Tandem Receiver w/ Antennas
description: The FrSky TD R18 2.4GHz 900M Dual-Band Tandem Receiver is unlike any other FrSky 2.4Ghz or 900Mhz receiver. The TD R18 works simultaneously at both 900Mhz and 2.4Ghz frequencies.

name: FrSky Archer Plus GR8 2.4GHz ACCESS Receiver
description: The Archer line now includes the new Archer Plus Series, boasting enhanced features. These receivers offer improved anti-RF-interference capability, both ACCESS and ACCST D16 modes, and a Black-Box function for preserving flight data.

name: FrSky RB-40 24CH PWM Receiver Redundancy Bus w/ Menu Scroll Button & LCD Screen
description: The FrSky RB-40 24CH PWM Receiver Redundancy Bus w/ Menu Scroll Button & LCD Screen features Dual Power and Triple Receiver.

name: RadioMaster R86C V2 6CH PWM Receiver - D8/D16/SFHSS
description: The RadioMaster R86C V2 PWM Receiver has 6 channels (PWM) /8 channels (SBUS) and is Frsky D8/D16 + Futaba SFHSS compatible, offering a range suitable to drones and RC modelers.

name: MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - PWM ELRS-R24-P6
description: The MATEKSYS ELRS-R24-P6 is a PWM receiver with a 2.4GHz frequency and ExpressLRS 3.0 firmware.

name: TBS Crossfire Nano Rx Pro
description: The TBS Crossfire Nano RX Pro is a higher telemetry output power option of the de-facto FPV standard receiver. It packs up to 500mW of output power and will ensure that your 50km flights occur without ever losing telemetry.

name: MATEKSYS Crossfire to PWM Converter - CRSF PWM 6
description: The MATEKSYS CRSF PWM 6 is a Crossfire to PWM Converter with 2 UARTS and 6 PWM Outputs.  This converter supports any Crossfire Protocol receivers, such as the 433MHz, 868MHz, 915MHz, or 2.4GHz.

name: MATEKSYS Crossfire to PWM Converter - CRSF PWM C
description: The MATEKSYS CRSF PWM C is a Crossfire to PWM Converter with 2 UARTS and 10 PWM Outputs.  This converter supports any Crossfire Protocol receivers, such as the 433MHz, 868MHz, 915MHz, or 2.4GHz.

name: MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - ELRS R24 D
description: The MATEKSYS ELRS R24 D Receiver is a 2.4GHz ExpressLRS diversity receiver with 22.5dbm Telemetry Power and two IPEX MHF 1 antennas.

name: Flysky FS-X14S AFHDS 2A Receiver
description: The Flysky X14S is one of the featured-filled AFHSD 2A receivers. Compatible with NV14, FS-TH9X, FS-I6, FS-i6X, FS-i4, and FS-i4X transmitters.

name: TBS Crossfire Diversity Nano Receiver - NDAA
description: TBS is once again pushing the limits of long-range flying with the NDAA Version of the TBS Crossfire Diversity Nano RX.

name: Happymodel ExpressLRS ES900TX + ES900RX Long Range Combo
description: The ES900TX and ES900RX modules sets are long-distance 915mhz or 868mhz wireless transmission equipment developed and designed based on the open-source ExpressLRS software. This set of modules is characterized by ultra-long-range, stable operation, and low latency. They are compatible with most Opentx remote controllers.

name: Radiomaster R81 V2 8CH Frsky D8/D16/SFHSS Compatible Nano Rx w/Sbus
description: Introducing the Radiomaster R-Series! This R81 Nano Receiver (with Sbus Output) has 8 channels and is Frsky D8 compatible, offering a range suitable for both drone and RC modelers. These R series receivers are either compatible with Frsky D8 or D16 modes and are suitable for RC drones and aircraft, etc.

name: TBS Crossfire 6CH PWM Nano Rx
description: As always, TBS is stepping up the Long Range / UHF game with their TBS Crossfire 6ch PWM Nano RX!

name: TBS Crossfire Nano Rx (SE) w/ Immortal T V2 Antenna
description: TBS Crossfire Nano RX for people who want to save space and solder. Full range, designed specifically for mini- and micro-quads! The Special Edition (SE) includes the TBS Immortal-T Antenna!

name: FlySky FS-A8S V2 2.4G 8CH Mini Receiver with PPM i-BUS SBUS Output
description: The FS-A8S is a compact 1-way receiver designed for multi-rotor aircraft.

name: FlySky FS-iA6B Receiver 6CH 2.4G AFHDS 2A Telemetry Receiver
description: FlySky FS-iA6B 6ch Receiver - Dual Antennas

name: RadioMaster XR4 Gemini Xrossband ELRS 2.4GHz/900MHz Dual-Band Diversity Receiver
description: The XR4 Receiver is a dual-band solution with dual LR1121 RF transceivers, supporting the advanced ExpressLRS Gemini Xrossband protocol (Gem-X). It operates on 2.4GHz and Sub-G 900MHz with dual T-type antennas for superior reception and stability.

name: ImmersionRC Ghost Átto 2.4Ghz Rx
description: The Ghost Átto receiver weighs in at about 0.6g, and is only 14.8 x 11.5mm, a 15% smaller footprint than its closest competitor.

name: RadioMaster XR3 Nano Multi-Frequency ELRS 2.4GHz/Sub-G 900MHz Diversity Receiver
description: The XR3 Receiver is a compact ExpressLRS receiver, measuring 20 x 15mm and powered by the third-generation Semtech LR1121 transceiver. It operates on 2.4GHz or Sub-G 900MHz, offering exceptional range and sensitivity in a lightweight design, ideal for any build.

name: TBS Tracer Nano RX
description: The next generation of crossfire with 2.4GHz technology. Smaller and faster than ever with diversity antennas.

name: RadioMaster Bandit BR3 915MHz ExpressLRS Receiver w/ Antennas
description: Introducing the all-new RadioMaster Bandit BR3 ExpressLRS Receiver.

name: RadioMaster RP4TD-M ELRS 2.4GHz Mini True Diversity Receiver
description: Introducing the RadioMaster RP4TD-M! Building on the success of the RP4TD, the RP4TD-M—is a compact and lightweight version.

name: RadioMaster XR1 Nano Multi-Frequency Receiver - 900MHz
description: The XR1 Receiver is a compact ExpressLRS receiver, measuring 20 x 13mm. Powered by the third-generation Semtech LR1121 transceiver, it operates on Sub-G 900MHz, offering excellent range and sensitivity in a lightweight design.

name: RadioMaster DBR4 Dual-Band Xross Gemini ExpressLRS Receiver
description: Introducing the DBR4 Receiver—the ideal match for the RadioMaster Nomad. This advanced dual-band, dual-channel Gemini receiver ensures seamless compatibility with the Nomad module.

name: RadioMaster XR2 Nano ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver
description: The XR2 Receiver is a compact 2.4GHz ExpressLRS receiver with an integrated tower antenna for excellent reception. Measuring just 16x12mm and weighing 0.8g, it fits effortlessly into tight builds.

name: iFlight ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver w/ 70mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver offers top-tier performance with exceptional frequency stability.

name: Axisflying ELRS 2.4Ghz Radio Receiver
description: The Axisflying ELRS Radio Receiver is a radio receiver based on the ELRS Protoco with a 2.4Ghz frequency. This receiver connects well with the Thor TX Pro Micro Module.

name: MATEKSYS MAVLink 900MHz Receiver - MR900-30
description: Enhance your drone's communication capabilities with the MATEKSYS MAVLink 900MHz Receiver, model MR900-30.

name: FrSky XM+ SBUS Mini Receiver
description: The Ultra Light FrSky XM+ Receiver with diversity antennas and full range.

name: Radiomaster ER5A V2 ExpressLRS 2.4GHz PWM Receiver w/ External Antenna
description: The RadioMaster ER5A V2 receiver harnesses the advanced ExpressLRS system, offering exceptional reliability, customizable settings, rapid response, and extended reception range for an unparalleled user experience.

name: TBS Crossfire/Tracer Nano Rx 6CH PWM Adapter
description: With this TBS Crossfire/Tracer Nano Rx 6CH PWM Adapter, you can enable connectivities with your servos via 6ch PWM.

name: TBS Fusion Hardware Upgrade Board
description: An upgraded receiver module board for the TBS Fusion Goggle Receiver Module.

name: TBS Crossfire 8CH Diversity Receiver
description: The TBS CROSSFIRE 8ch Diversity Receiver is a compact R/C receiver with 8ch PWM outputs (PPM capable), with best-in-industry noise-rejection and record-breaking range capability.

name: TBS Crossfire Micro Receiver V2
description: Super-tiny, super-lightweight UHF long range receiver.

name: FrSky ARCHER R10+ 2.4GHz Receiver
description: The R10+ Receiver features 10 configurable channel ports* for PWM, SBUS, FBUS, or S.Port, offering versatile control.

name: iFlight ELRS Dualband 500mW Receiver + 160mm Antenna
description: The iFlight ELRS Dualband 500mW Receiver + 160mm Antenna houses high-power telemetry inside a sleek, single-side component design.

name: RadioMaster R88 V2 8CH PWM Receiver w/ SBUS - D8/D16/SFHSS
description: The RadioMaster R88 V2 Receiver features PWM and SBUS Output. This receiver has 8 channels and is Frsky D8/D16 + Futaba SFHSS compatible, offering a range suitable to drones and RC modelers.

name: Frsky Archer Plus GR6 2.4GHz Receiver
description: The Archer Plus GR6 is ideal for glider pilots, featuring full-range signal strength, dual antennas, and a compact design for tight spaces.

name: MATEKSYS mLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - mR24-30
description: The MATEKSYS mLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - mR24-30 delivers long-range performance in a compact design.

name: RadioMaster R86 V2 6CH PWM Receiver - D8/D16/SFHSS
description: The RadioMaster R86 V2 PWM Receiver has 6 channels and is Frsky D8/D16 + Futaba SFHSS compatible, offering a range suitable to drones and RC modelers.

name: FlySky FS-iA6 Receiver 6CH 2.4G AFHDS 2A Receiver
description: FlySky FS-iA6 6ch Receiver - Dual Antennas

name: FrSky R-XSR 2.4GHz 16CH ACCESS/ACCST Micro Receiver w/ S-Bus & CPPM
description: This is the smallest full telemetry SBUS receiver from FrSky. FrSky R-XSR 2.4GHz 16CH ACCST Micro Receiver w/ S-Bus & CPPM.

name: FrSky R9 SX + OTA 900MHz Long Range  Receiver (ACCESS)
description: The R9 SX is the enhanced version of the R9 Slim series of long-range capable receivers. It adds 3-pin servo connectors with 6 full PWM channels and utilizes the dual-antenna design.

name: Radio Master R81 V2 8CH FrSky D8/D16 Compatible Nano Receiver w/ SBUS + Pre-Soldered Wires
description: Introducing the Radiomaster R-Series! This R81 V2 Nano Receiver (with SBUS Output) has 8 channels and is Frsky D8 compatible, offering a range suitable for both drone and RC modelers.

name: Frsky R9 MM-OTA 915MHz Receiver
description: The R9 MM-OTA 915MHz Receiver supports wireless firmware updates over the air making binding to receivers even easier!

name: GEPRC Nano PA500 Receiver - ELRS 915MHz
description: The GEPRC ELRS Nano 915M PA500 Receiver is an advanced, affordable ExpressLRS-based receiver offering long-range, low-latency performance.

name: Flywoo TCXO ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver - EL24E
description: The new Flywoo TCXO ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver - EL24E uses a temperature-compensated crystal oscillator to improve the accuracy of the MCU clock frequency, thus enhancing the performance and reliability of the RC link.

name: SpeedyBee Nano 2.4GHz ELRS Receiver
description: The Speedybee Nano 2.4GHz ELRS Receiver is an advanced open-source RC system offering long range, low latency, high update rates, and many useful features.

name: RadioMaster XR3 Nano Multi-Frequency Diversity Receiver - 900MHz
description: The XR3 Receiver is a compact ExpressLRS receiver, measuring 20 x 15mm and powered by the third-generation Semtech LR1121 transceiver. It operates Sub-G 900MHz, offering exceptional range and sensitivity in a lightweight design, which is ideal for any build.

name: RadioMaster RP1 V2 ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Nano Receiver w/ 65mm UFL T-Antenna
description: The RadioMaster RP1 V2 ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Nano Receiver w/ 65mm UFL T-Antenna is an open-source receiver based on ExpressLRS.

name: MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz PWM Vario Receiver - ELRS R24-P6V
description: Introducing the MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz PWM Vario Receiver - ELRS R24-P6V, your go-to solution for reliable RC control.

name: Flywoo TCXO ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver - EL24P
description: The new Flywoo TCXO ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver - EL24P utilizes a temperature-compensated crystal oscillator to enhance the accuracy of the MCU clock frequency, thereby improving the performance and reliability of the RC link.

name: RadioMaster ER3C-i ExpressLRS 2.4GHz PWM Receiver w/ Built-in Antenna
description: The RadioMaster ER3C-i receiver harnesses the advanced ExpressLRS system, offering exceptional reliability, customizable settings, rapid response, and extended reception range for an unparalleled user experience.

name: Happymodel TCXO ExpressLRS 2.4GHz 6CH PMW Receiver - EPW6
description: The Happymodel EPW6 TCXO is a 2.4GHz ELRS receiver with PWM capabilities and two antennas.

name: RadioMaster Micro 2.4GHz 4-in-1 Module -  JR / Nano
description: The Radiomaster Micro 2.4GHz 4-in-1 Module is an external nano module that can also be used on JR modules with the included JR adapter.

name: RadioMaster RP2 V2 ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Nano Receiver w/ Fixed SMT Antenna
description: The RadioMaster RP2 V2 ExpressLRS 2.4ghz Nano Receiver w/ Fixed SMT Antenna is an open-source receiver based on ExpressLRS.

name: Happymodel TCXO ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Nano Receiver - EP1
description: The Happymodel EP1 TCXO RX is a nano-sized true diversity 2.4GHz ELRS receiver with RF amps that comes with a IPEX connector for a dipole antenna.

name: Happymodel TCXO ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Nano Receiver - EP2
description: The Happymodel EP2 TCXO RX is a nano-sized true diversity 2.4GHz ELRS receiver with RF amps and comes with a built-in SMD antenna.

name: Happymodel TCXO ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Nano Receiver - EP1 Dual
description: The Happymodel EP1 Dual TCXO is nano-sized true diversity 2.4GHz ELRS receiver with RF amps and two antennas.

name: Skystars Supreme ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Diversity Dual Nano Receiver w/ Brass Antenna
description: The Skystars Supreme ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Diversity Dual Nano Receiver is a fantastic option for any ELRS user! This receiver features two antennas that operate in diversity mode (antenna-switching) for optimum reception and performance.

name: Immersion RC Ghost Ultimate Hybrid 5.8GHz VTX & 2.4GHz Rx
description: The Immersion RC Ghost Ultimate Hybrid 5.8GHz VTX & 2.4GHz takes the innovative Ghost Hybrid concept to a new level, with the traditional long-range/low latency Ghost uplink, and a high-power Tramp video transmitter, packaged in a beautiful anodized heatsink.

name: FrSky TD MX 2.4GHz 900M Dual-Band Tandem Receiver w/ Antennas
description: The FrSky TD MX 2.4GHz 900M Dual-Band Tandem Receiver adopts the triple antenna design that provides multi-directional wide coverage for the remote signal.

name: FrSky TD R10 2.4GHz 900M Dual Band Tandem Receiver w/ Antennas
description: The FrSky TD R10 2.4GHz 900M Dual Band Tandem Receiver w/ Antennas is unlike any other FrSky 2.4Ghz or 900Mhz receiver - the TD R10 works simultaneously at both 900Mhz and 2.4Ghz frequencies.

name: Happymodel EP1 Dual True Diversity ExpressLRS Receiver w/ Antennas
description: The Happymodel EP1 Dual is a true diversity 2.4GHz ELRS receiver with RF amps and two antennas.

name: FrSky RB-30 24CH PWM Receiver Redundancy Bus -  Dual Power & Triple Receiver
description: The FrSky RB-30 24CH PWM Receiver Redundancy Bus features Dual Power & Triple Receiver.

name: RadioMaster R84 V2 4CH PWM Receiver - D8/D16/SFHSS
description: The RadioMaster R84 V2 Receiver features PWM. This receiver has 4 channels and is Frsky D8/D16 + Futaba SFHSS compatible, offering a range suitable to drones and RC modelers.

name: HGLRC Hermes ExpressLRS Receiver Kit - 2400RX-T w/ Connector
description: The HGLRC Hermes ExpressLRS 2400RX-T Receiver Kit w/ Connector is lightweight and compact. This receiver is suitable for long-range, racing, or freestyle flights!

name: Happymodel ExpressLRS PWM Receiver Kit - 5CH EPW5 2.4GHz
description: The Happymodel ExpressLRS PWM Kit incudes a 5CH EPW5 2.4GHz Receiver with two antennas and three 6-pin adapters. Perfect for your Fixed Wing airplane!

name: HGLRC Hermes ExpressLRS Receiver Kit w/ 900RX + 915MHz Omnidirectional T-Antenna
description: The HGLRC Hermes Receiver Kit features a 900 ELRS Receiver and a 915MHz Omnidirectional T-Antenna. Lightweight and compact, this receiver is suitable for long-range, racing, or freestyle flights!

name: HGLRC Hermes ExpressLRS Receiver - 2400RX-S
description: The HGLRC Hermes ExpressLRS 2400RX-S Receiver is lightweight and compact. This receiver is suitable for long-range, racing, or freestyle flights!

name: HGLRC Hermes ExpressLRS Receiver Kit - 2400RX-T
description: The HGLRC Hermes ExpressLRS 2400RX-T Receiver is lightweight and compact. This receiver is suitable for long-range, racing, or freestyle flights!

name: MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - PWM ELRS R24 P
description: The MATEKSYS ELRS R24 P Receiver is a 2.4GHz ExpressLRS PMW receiver with 12dbm Telemetry Power.

name: ImmersionRC Ghost JR TX Module + Atto Receivers Bundle
description: This ImmersionRC Ghost JR Module Bundle is designed for both reliable control at extreme range, and extremely low latency with a best-in-class frame rate for the Race circuit. This combination includes a Ghost JR TX Module and two Ghost Atto Receivers! Move so fast everyone will think they've seen a ghost!

name: ImmersionRC Tramp/Ghost Hybrid UNO V2 2.4GHz Rx & 25-600mW 5.8GHz VTX
description: The new ImmersionRC Tramp/Ghost Hybrid UNO V2 is a high-end analog 5.8GHz 25mW - 600mW video transmitter and 2.4GHz diversity receiver!

name: BetaFPV ExpressLRS Nano 915MHz Receiver
description: The BETAFPV Nano 915MHZ receiver is based on the ExpressLRS project, an open-source RC link for RC applications. ExpressLRS aims to achieve the best possible link performance in both speeds, latency, and range.

name: Happymodel ExpressLRS ES900RX Receiver
description: The ES900RX  is a long-distance 915mhz wireless receiver developed and designed based on the open-source ExpressLRS software. This module is characterized by ultra-long-range, stable operation, and low latency. It is compatible with most Opentx remote controllers, especially suitable for Radiomaster TX16S and Jumper T12, T16, and T18 series remote controllers, and are basically plug and play.

name: iFlight iF8 R81 8CH Receiver w/ SBUS
description: The iF8 R81 Receiver by iFlight is a nano receiver that is compatible with Frsky D8, and comes with 8CH and SBUS

name: Happymodel Speki+ Micro 2.4GHz Receiver - DSM2/DSMX/SRXL Built-in PA and RSSI Telemetry
description: The Happymodel Speki+ is the upgrade DSM2/DSMX/SRXL protocol compatible Micro 2.4Ghz receiver that comes with a PA module, longer range, and stable signal transmission, with RSSI telemetry.

name: TBS Tracer 6CH PWM Nano RX
description: TBS TRACER 6CH PWM NANO RX FEATURES 250Hz: Fastest available radio and telemetry link!

name: ImmersionRC Ghost Proton 30x30 Pack
description: The ImmersionRC Ghost Proton 30x30 Pack is a printed circuit board (PCB) designed to dramatically simplify wiring, mounting, and cooling of Tramp Nano + Ghost combinations.

name: ImmersionRC Ghost Proton 25x25 Pack
description: The ImmersionRC Ghost Proton 25x25 Pack is a printed circuit board (PCB) designed to dramatically simplify wiring, mounting, and cooling of Tramp Nano + Ghost combinations.

name: Dragon Link Advanced 433 MHz 1000 mW Receiver
description: Dragon Link 433 MHZ 1000 mW high Power Radio Modem / Telemetry Receiver. Full 50 Kilometer RC Range and 50 Kilometer Radio Modem / Telemetry Range. World's smallest, most advanced RC receiver with a built-in 1000 mW full radio modem. Compatible with all Dragon Link 433 MHZ Advanced Systems.

name: FrSky ARCHER R10 Pro 2.4GHz ACCESS Receiver
description: The Archer R10 Pro has 10 high-precision PWM channel outputs and features excellent Anti-interference performance when it comes to spark-ignition on internal combustion models.

name: FrSky ARCHER R6 2.4GHz ACCESS Receiver
description: The Archer R6 has 6 high-precision PWM channel outputs bundled in a compact light-weight design. It supports full-range signal strength with dual detachable antennas to assure optimal antenna reception and maximum range.

name: FrSky ARCHER GR6 2.4GHz ACCESS Receiver
description: The ARCHER GR6 has 6 high-precision PWM channel output and is ideal for any type of glider pilot. It features an upgraded high-precision variometer that gives pilots a quick, accurate altitude and vertical speed data.

name: ImmersionRC Ghost 2.4Ghz Combo Kit (1x TX, 3x RX, 3x Antennas)
description: The Ghost is the next generation R/C control system from ImmersionRC.

name: FrSky S.Port Neuron 8A SBEC Regulator for Transmitter and Receiver
description: The 8A SBEC is the latest S.Port-capable accessory in the Neuron Series line-up.

name: CubePilot RFD 900TX MOD Bundle - Tx/Rx Combo
description: The RFDesign TXMOD is an all in one long-range telemetry data and RC control system.

name: Spektrum SRXL2 Remote Serial Receiver with Telemetry (SPM4651T)
description: The SPM4651T DSMX SRXL2 Serial Micro Receiver takes the original SPM4649T receiver and adds more value, functionality, longer control, and telemetry link range.

name: Jumper SF410-Mini 4CH Full Range S-FHSS Receiver w/ SBUS PWM Output
description: The Jumper SF series of receivers offer a high quality yet affordable S-FHSS solution for RC pilots. The SF410-Mini is ideal for ultralight flight systems that need a tiny receiver solution.

name: Jumper R1 - D16 Frsky Compatible Micro Receiver with S.Port and S.bus
description: The Jumper R1 D16 receiver is compatible with all devices capable of using FrSky D16 mode. Ideal for mini-drones or models requiring an S.bus or S.port connection.

name: Jumper SF410 4CH Full Range S-FHSS Receiver w/ SBUS PWM Output
description: The Jumper SF series of receivers offer a high quality yet affordable S-FHSS solution for RC pilots.

name: Frsky RXSR-FC (OMNIBUS F4 Fireworks V2) Flight Controller w/ Integrated R-XSR
description: The FrSky RXSR-FC (OMNIBUS F4 Fireworks V2) aims to give users tons of options in their builds. The RXSR-FC uses the ICM20608 over SPI to produce stable flight performance. Integrated with the RXSR receiver mounted on-board protection box, and the soft-mounted ICM20608 runs perfectly under 32k Gyro loop.

name: FrSky RXSR-FC - Omnibus F4 V6 Flight Controller w/ Integrated R-XSR
description: The FrSky RXSR-FC (OMNIBUS F4 V6) uses the MPU6000 over SPI to produce stable flight performance. Integrated with the RXSR receiver mounted on-board in a protection box. It also features a barometer and AB7456 OSD chip for the Betaflight integrated OSD.

name: FrSky G-RX8 2.4GHz 8/16CH ACCST Telemetry Receiver
description: FrSky built the variometer sensor into the RX8R receiver, giving you telemetry data like altitude and vertical speed.

name: Holybro 100mW Transceiver Telemetry Radio Set V3 (915Mhz)
description: The Holybro 100mW Transceiver Telemetry Radio Set V3 (915Mhz). Pixhawk 4 compatible.

name: FrSky R9 Slim+ 915MHz Long Range Receiver
description: The FrSky R9 Slim+ receiver is the updated version of R9 Slim, with optimized performance and 2 detachable antennas.

name: FrSky R9 Slim+ OTA 915MHz Long Range Receiver w/ 2pcs Dipole T Antennas
description: The FrSky R9 Slim+ receiver is the updated version of R9 Slim, with optimized performance and 2 detachable antennas.

name: FrSky R9 Mini 900MHz Long Range Receiver
description: The R9 Mini is FrSkys smallest version of the R9 long range receivers,with low latency and a much smaller form factor.

name: FrSky R9 900MHz 16CH Long Range Receiver
description: The R9 16CH is FrSky new generation 900MHz long range receiver.

name: FrSky RB-10 Redundancy Bus-10
description: The FrSky Redundancy Bus is a unique switchboard module that can operate 2 receivers and 2 batteries to provide you with total peace of mind when flying your model.

name: OverSky Scisky Micro F3 Brushed Flight Control built-in RX option, FrSky
description: The Scisky F3 brushed flight control board based on F3 EVO hardware, supports CleanFlight and BetaFlight firmware.

name: FrSky XM SBUS Micro Receiver
description: The Ultra Light FrSky XM Receiver Up To 16CH.

name: FrSky X4R-SB - 3/16 Channel Receiver with SBUS and CPPM without pins
description: FrSky X4R-SB - 3/16 Channel Receiver with SBUS and CPPM without pins.

name: Radiolink R6DS 6-CH S.BUS 2.4GHz DSSS Receiver
description: A small 6 channel S.BUS / PPM / PWM ready receiver from Radiolink.

name: FrSky S6R 6ch Receiver w/ 3-Axis Stabilization + Smart Port Telemetry
description: The FrSky S6R 6ch Receiver w/ 3-Axis Stabilization and Smart Port. Features a built in 3-axis gyro and 3-axis accelerometer sensor for fixed wing.

name: Radiolink R10D 10-CH 2.4GHz DSSS Receiver
description: A miniature 10 channel receiver from Radiolink.

name: Spektrum AR7700 Serial Receiver with PPM, SRXL, Remote Rx
description: The AR7700 is the seamless one-wire connection!

name: Spektrum DSM2 AIRMOD with AR7010 JR-Compatible
description: Spektrum DSM2 with AR7010 JR-Compatible 9CH Module System

name: BETAFPV ELRS 2.4GHz Nano Receiver
description: The BETAFPV Nano receiver is based on the ExpressLRS project, an open-source RC link for RC applications.

name: RadioMaster XR1 Nano Multi-Frequency ELRS 2.4GHz/Sub-G 900MHz Dual-Band Receiver
description: The XR1 Receiver is a compact ExpressLRS receiver, measuring 20 x 13mm. Powered by the third-generation Semtech LR1121 transceiver, it operates on 2.4GHz or Sub-G 900MHz, offering excellent range and sensitivity in a lightweight design.

name: Happymodel ExpressLRS Nano 2.4GHz EP1 RX
description: The Happymodel 2.4GHz ELRS nano series receiver has an open-source program based on ExpressLRS. Due to the low-latency and high-refresh-rate RF module, they are very comfortable for FPV Racing and Long Range FPV. These are very suitable for Tiny whoops because of the ultra-light and Nano size!

name: Happymodel ExpressLRS Nano 2.4GHz EP2 RX
description: The Happymodel 2.4GHz ELRS nano series receiver has an open-source program based on ExpressLRS.

name: FrSky RX8R Pro 2.4G ACCST 8/16CH SBUS Telemetry Receiver
description: The FrSky RX8R Pro 2.4G ACCST 8/16CH Telemetry  Receiver w/ Redundancy. the Pro has reduced latency and increased accuracy compared to the original.

name: RadioMaster ER5C V2 ExpressLRS 2.4GHz PWM Receiver w/ External Antenna
description: The RadioMaster ER5C V2 receiver harnesses the advanced ExpressLRS system, offering exceptional reliability, customizable settings, rapid response, and extended reception range for an unparalleled user experience.

name: RadioMaster Bandit BR1 915MHz ExpressLRS Receiver w/ Antennas
description: The RadioMaster Bandit BR1 Expresslrs Receiver features a built-in TCXO (temperature-compensated crystal oscillator) which ensures reliable, stable, and accurate signal reception for superior performance in demanding environments.

name: Frsky TD R6 2.4GHz/900MHz Dual Receiver
description: The Tandem dual-band Receiver simultaneously operates on 2.4GHz and 900MHz, delivering low latency, long-range, and reliable, anti-interference performance.

name: FrSky X6R 16ch Receiver, SBUS, Smart Port
description: The FrSky X6R 16ch Receiver with SBUS, Smart Port - Standard 150mm Coaxial Antenna

name: Dragon Link Micro UHF Receiver - Next Gen. Firmware
description: A micro sized 12 channel UHF receiver for the Dragon Link system.

name: FlySky FS-iA10CH Receiver 10CH 2.4G AFHDS 2A Telemetry Receiver
description: FlySky FS-iA10 Receiver 10CH 2.4G AFHDS 2A Telemetry Receive with Dual Antennas

name: Dragon Link Nano Receiver - Wire Antenna
description: The Dragon Link Nano Receiver is a full range, fully filtered, fully shielded, full feature, full telemetry receiver. Dragon Link used the highest quality components and spent the extra money on filtering to give you the best performance possible from this receiver.

name: FlySky FS-RX2A Pro V1 2.4Ghz Receiver
description: The FS-RX2A Pro V1  is an AFHDS 2A-compatible receiver in a minuscule form factor.

name: GEPRC Gemini Xrossband Receiver - ELRS 2.4Ghz/915Mhz
description: Unlock the full potential of long-range and reliable control with the GEPRC Gemini Xrossband Receiver - ExpressLRS 2.4GHz/915MHz. Built on Semtech’s cutting-edge LR1121 RF chip and developed from the open-source ExpressLRS project, this advanced dual-band receiver supports both sub-GHz (915MHz) and 2.4GHz bands—delivering seamless frequency switching and dual-band operation for superior link performance.

name: Holybro 500mW Transceiver Telemetry Radio Set V3 (915Mhz)
description: The Holybro 500mW Transceiver Telemetry Radio Set V3 (915Mhz). Pixhawk 4 compatible.

name: ImmersionRC Ghost Atto Duo 2.4GHz Receiver
description: The Ghost Atto Duo is a high-end receiver by ImmersionRC for drone racing that combines two independent receiver channels, and twin antennas, to dramatically reduce lost packets during racing.

name: FrSky Delta 8 2.4Ghz 8CH Multi-Brand Receiver
description: FrSky Delta 8 2.4Ghz 8CH Multi-Brand Receiver - D8/V8 Futaba S-FHSS/FHSS Hitec AFHSS Compatible

name: FrSky RXSR-FC - OmniNXT F7 Flight Controller w/ Integrated R-XSR
description: The FrSky RXSR-FC (OMNINXT F7) is developed based on the newly designed NXT architecture. It is integrated with the RXSR receiver mounted in a protection box, and uses the trusty MPU6000 Gyro with an additional ICM20608 on top.

name: Jumper SF610 6CH Full Range S-FHSS Receiver w/ SBUS PWM Output
description: The Jumper SF series of receivers offer a high quality yet affordable S-FHSS solution for RC pilots.

name: Jumper SF810 8CH Full Range S-FHSS Receiver w/ SBUS PWM Output
description: The Jumper SF series of receivers offer a high quality yet affordable S-FHSS solution for RC pilots.
